description: Validation rules for news-monitor watermarks and delta items.

rules: last_run is ISO-8601; must be advanced to now at the end of every run
seen is an array of normalized URLs / stable keys; capped to a rolling window (e.g. 500 entries / 90 days)
an item is 'new' only if dated after last_run AND its url/key is not in seen
dedup same-URL and same-announcement-across-outlets (keep highest source tier)
never fabricate items; an empty new_items array is a valid result
